title: Top 3 Flat Wall Shower Caddy – Pack Of 2 Caddy Organiser; Large and Small – No Drill Self-Adhesive Suction Cups – Wall Mounted Storage Basket – For Shampoo, Shower Gel
features: Compact Design: The space saver design of the shower organiser facilitates you to keep your space organized without taking up much space. Mount the bathroom caddy up on the wall and it can accommodate various items. The no drill suction cups are going to hold the wall mount caddy securely up on the wall for a long time.

Ergonomic Design: With a proper ventilated design, it drains out the excessive water instantly, keeping your items dry and clean. The shower rack also makes an ideal organizational item in small spaces like a studio apartment, dorms, etc.

Multipurpose Organiser: The package contains 2 caddy’s - one small and one large storage caddy to meet your various needs, 28.2x10.9x10.6 and 29.7x13x10.6cm. Use this shelf organiser to tidy up your bathroom accessory like shampoo, soap, shower gel, deodorant, shaving cream, etc.

Easy Installation and Maintenance: The bathroom shelf comes with an instruction manual that you need to read before installation. No drilling or professional tools are required. Clean the wall or the surface of the tiles where you are going to apply the self-adhesive hooks of the bathroom storage. To remove the stickers, apply a little heat and slowly peel them off. Then put it on your target point and apply a little pressure. No drill 4 strong wall stickers included plus 2 so 6 in total.

Sturdy and Reliable: Our strong shower storage basket is made using high-quality 201 stainless steel. The powerful suction cups of the caddy organiser keep it attached to the wall firmly and can bear up to 6 kgs of weight per caddy. The wall-mounted storage will never deform or fall down no matter how long you use it.
description: Product Description Looking for a sturdy organization caddy that can hold up your toiletries for a long period of time? Need something space-saving for your small space? Our pack of 2 Shower Caddy can help you with that. Durable Choice: Made using high-quality 201 stainless steel material, the bathroom organiser is sturdy enough to be your long-term organization partner. With strong suction cups, the storage basket can accommodate items with up to 6kgs of weight, without falling or deforming. Compact Design: The wall-mount bathroom shelf organiser takes up very little space but accommodates multiple items, helping you to keep your area clean and organized. The bathroom shelf organiser can be installed on any clean, smooth, and flat surface like smooth tiles, smooth marble, tempered glass, solid metal, etc. Versatile Caddy: This space-saving storage basket is especially suitable for small spaces like studio apartments, toilets, kitchens, etc. to keep them tidy and clean, by keeping all small items organized. Use the bathroom caddy organiser to store your toiletries, cosmetics, spice jars or other small items. Click on the button and add the wall-mounted storage organiser to your cart today.
